name: Tinymight 2 - O-Ring Pack
summary: This o-ring pack is specifically designed for the Tinymight 2.
description: This o-ring pack is specifically designed for the Tinymight 2. All and is made entirely of food-grade silicone for safe and effective use. 5 x small O-rings for the cooling unit 5 x small larger O-rings for the cooling unit A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
